data.description: Already 5 dead as a result of a missile strike on Dnipro, - OVA

data.title: AVITA Medical Announces Positive Interim Results from Cohealyx® Study Demonstrating Accelerated Time to Skin Grafting
data.description: Interim data from Cohealyx reveals a significant ~20-day decrease in time to graft compared to the benchmark. Investigators are highly satisfied with the results, and the product has shown consistent performance in treating various types of wounds.

data.title: NevGold Announces Positive, Consistent Drill Results on Historic Gold Leach Pads Including 0.34% Antimony And 0.41 g/t Au Over 12.5 Meters; Path to Near-Term Antimony Production Continues
data.description: Vancouver, BC, April 14, 2026 - NevGold Corp. is excited to report encouraging antimony and gold sonic drill findings at its Limousine Butte Project in Nevada. The historic gold leach pads, dating back to mining activities in 1989-1990 when gold prices were below US$400/oz, displayed positive results. The Company, listed on TSXV as NAU, OTCQX as NAUFF, and Frankfurt as 5E50, aims for potential antimony production by 2027. A maiden antimony-gold Mineral Resource Estimate is scheduled for completion in Q2-2026 based on the new drill data.

data.title: Perimeter Medical Imaging AI to Participate in the 2026 Bloom Burton & Co. Healthcare Investor Conference
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in both Toronto and Dallas, Perimeter Medical Imaging AI, Inc. (TSXV: PINK) (OTCQX: PYNKF), a company specializing in medical technology, will provide a business update at an upcoming event.

data.title: NextPlat's GTC Receives Satellite Enabled Internet of Things (IoT) Contracts Valued at $400,000 as its Government and Military Pipeline Surpasses $1.2 Million Through Q1 2026
data.description: In April 14, 2026, in Hallandale Beach, Florida, NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ: NXPL, NXPLW) reported that their contract pipeline for early 2026 is steadily increasing. The company, known for its consumer products and services worldwide, is observing a rise in demand from government and military sectors for connectivity solutions.

data.title: Equifax Introduces The Work Number® Record Indicator for Auto or Personal Loans
data.description: Equifax® (NYSE: EFX) recently introduced a new solution called The Work Number® Record Indicator for auto or personal loans, aimed at expediting digital verifications. This release, made on April 14, 2026, is expected to reduce friction for lenders and borrowers. This innovative system is designed to streamline the process and provide quicker income verification, ultimately benefiting both parties involved.

data.title: Auxly Announces Normal Course Issuer Bid
data.description: Toronto-based Auxly Cannabis Group Inc. ("Auxly" or the "Company") has recently disclosed the submission of a notice to the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) regarding its intent to conduct a normal course of activity. The TSX has approved the notice from Auxly, a company listed under the tickers TSX: XLY and OTCQB: CBWTF.

data.title: Oracle AI Enables More Connected, Compliant Capital Projects
data.description: In Austin, Texas on April 14, 2026, Oracle Primavera Unifier introduced AI-enhanced features that aid owners and teams in accelerating cross-system integrations. These advancements also enhance audit transparency and provide portfolio-level insight for capital programs. The innovation was announced at the Oracle Edge Customer Summit, offering cutting-edge technologies to facilitate project management.

data.title: Paul M. Wilson, NetReputation CEO, and Michael Muldowney's City of Champions Nears Million-Dollar Milestone for Prostate Cancer Research
data.description: In Wellesley, Massachusetts, Paul M. Wilson and Michael Muldowney revealed that the fourth edition of the City of Champions Golf Tournament has raised over $900,000 for prostate cancer research. Approaching the significant $1 million mark, the annual event is scheduled for May 11, 2026, at Wellesley Country Club. Gathering support from industry and community figures, the tournament plays a crucial role in funding organizations focused on this cause.

data.title: New Leadership at DWK Life Sciences: Michael Werth Succeeds Armin Reiche
data.description: In WERTHEIM, Germany, DWK Life Sciences, a key player in precision glassware and primary packaging for the life sciences sector, is transitioning to its next phase. After steering the company for about 25 years, Armin Reiche (64) will be passing the reins to Michael Werth on April 13, 2026. Werth will take on the role of Group CEO, boasting considerable global leadership background in technology and production sectors. This change marks a significant development for DWK Life Sciences as it moves forward under new leadership.

data.title: Albertsons® Companies, Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results
data.description: Idaho-based Albertsons Companies recently released their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company disclosed key figures regarding their performance during this period, emphasizing essential financial data without specifying the source.

data.title: Solar Landscape and Nuveen Energy Infrastructure Credit Close $117 Million Preferred Tax Equity Investment to Anchor $240 Million Portfolio
data.description: A significant development has been disclosed by Solar Landscape, a prominent commercial and industrial rooftop solar and storage independent power producer, revealing a recent preferred tax equity investment deal. The company finalized a substantial agreement worth $117 million with Nuveen Energy Infrastructure Credit (Nuveen EIC). This marks the second major collaboration between the entities in under a year. Nuveen EIC has pledged the full sum of $117 million to Solar Landscape as part of the investment arrangement. This transaction underscores the continued partnership and financial support between the two organizations.

data.title: Accenture Federal Services to Deliver Early Operating Capability for DOE’s Genesis Mission CM2US
data.description: Accenture Federal Services is set to spearhead a rapid engineering and integration sprint in Arlington, Virginia, to support the U.S. Department of Energy's Genesis Mission. The goal is to bolster the energy and defense sectors by advancing the Critical Mineral and Materials to Unlock Supply (CM2US) program. This initiative, in collaboration with DOE's National Laboratories, aims to enhance the nation's supply chain security. The sprint will focus on delivering early capabilities for the mission, ensuring the resilience of critical infrastructure. This partnership underscores the commitment to national security and innovation in the U.S. energy and defense industries.

data.title: AprilAire Launches Affordable Smart Home Water Leak Detector in Time for Spring
data.description: As temperatures increase and spring approaches, even a minimal quantity of water can lead to significant harm to household interiors. Identifying leaks early can prevent major issues, easing concerns while away from home. In a recent report from MADISON, Wis. on April 14, 2026, AprilAire, a top provider of Healthy Air solutions, highlights the urgency of this matter. Being vigilant in checking for leaks can save homeowners from costly repairs and potential damage. Don't underestimate the impact even a small amount of water can have on your property, be proactive and prevent any future complications.

data.title: Bank of New York Mellon Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: NYSE-listed Bank of New York Mellon Corporation is set to unveil its first-quarter earnings on April 16. Analysts predict earnings per share to reach $1.93, a significant increase from the previous year's $1.58. Revenue for the quarter is estimated to be around $5.19 billion, up from $4.79 billion in the same period last year. In a recent announcement on February 26, the company disclosed a public offering of $500,000,000 worth of Depositary Shares linked to preferred stock. Following this news, the stock price rose by 1.3%, closing at $129.15 on Monday. For further insights, interested individuals can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga to access the latest analyst ratings by filtering through various criteria. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: SEC approves DeFi, Bitcoin and Ethereum surge. Saylor makes big purchases as Kraken faces extortion.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin and Ethereum has surged significantly, with Bitcoin hitting a new record high of around $63,000 and Ethereum also experiencing a substantial increase. The decentralized finance (DeFi) sector is showing strong growth and prominence. Michael Saylor, known for his bullish stance on Bitcoin, has made substantial purchases of the cryptocurrency. In a concerning development, the cryptocurrency exchange Kraken has reportedly been targeted for extortion.

data.title: Designed in Milan, Built for Europe: GAC Debuts the AION UT Electric Hatchback
data.description: On April 14, 2026, GAC unveiled its latest addition to the electric AION series, the AION UT in Milan. This electric hatchback marks the second model in the line specifically tailored for the European market. Designed by GAC and co-created by the Advanced Design Centre in Milan, the AION UT introduces sleek and sustainable mobility to the region. This launch signifies GAC's commitment to eco-friendly transport solutions and showcases their innovative approach to electric vehicles.

data.title: EIG Holds Initial Closing of Fund Focused on Geothermal Power Projects
data.description: Today, EIG, a prominent institutional investor in the global energy and infrastructure industries, disclosed the launch of EIG Geothermal Catalyst Partners (the “Fund”). This dedicated investment platform is specifically aimed at backing the growth of upcoming geothermal projects in the United States. The Fund's main objective is to offer mid-stage development funding to facilitate the progress of geothermal projects by meeting essential technical and commercial milestones. This announcement marks the initial closing of the Fund, which signals the beginning of its operations in investing in the geothermal sector in the U.S.
